name: KommoConnector
description: Connects to the Kommo CRM (formerly amoCRM) REST API using a long-lived OAuth access token. Tenant-scoped by subdomain (https://{subdomain}.kommo.com/api/v4). Supports leads, contacts, companies, customers, tasks, events, notes, custom fields, pipelines, users and outbound webhooks.

install_fields.label: Kommo Subdomain
install_fields.help: Your Kommo subdomain — e.g. 'mycompany' if your URL is https://mycompany.kommo.com. The field accepts the bare subdomain or the full URL; the connector normalises both.

install_fields.label: Long-Lived Access Token
install_fields.placeholder: Paste your Kommo long-lived OAuth access token
install_fields.help: Generated from Kommo → Settings → Integrations → your integration → 'Long-Lived Access Token'. Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every request.

install_fields.label: Kommo API Base URL
install_fields.help: Override the computed base URL. Leave blank to use the per-subdomain default.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft per-minute cap for outbound Kommo requests. Kommo enforces ~7 req/sec server-side; the client retries 429 with exponential backoff.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates subdomain and access_token and marks the connector installed.

apis.name: Authorize
apis.description: API-key wrapper that returns a TokenInfo whose access_token is the configured long-lived token.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Kommo API connectivity by calling GET /account.

apis.name: List Leads
apis.description: List leads with paging, optional free-text query and Kommo-style nested filter (bracket-flattened).

apis.name: Get Lead
apis.description: GET /leads/{id}.

apis.name: Create Lead
apis.description: POST /leads — body MUST be an array (Kommo bulk semantics).

apis.name: Update Lead
apis.description: PATCH /leads/{id} with the supplied fields.

apis.name: Delete Lead
apis.description: DELETE /leads/{id}.

apis.name: List Contacts
apis.description: List contacts with paging and optional free-text query.

apis.name: Get Contact
apis.description: GET /contacts/{id}.

apis.name: Create Contact
apis.description: POST /contacts — body MUST be an array.

apis.name: Update Contact
apis.description: PATCH /contacts/{id}.

apis.name: Delete Contact
apis.description: DELETE /contacts/{id}.

apis.name: List Companies
apis.description: List companies with paging.

apis.name: Get Company
apis.description: GET /companies/{id}.

apis.name: Create Company
apis.description: POST /companies — body MUST be an array.

apis.name: Update Company
apis.description: PATCH /companies/{id}.

apis.name: Delete Company
apis.description: DELETE /companies/{id}.

apis.name: List Customers
apis.description: List customers with paging.

apis.name: List Tasks
apis.description: List tasks with paging and optional Kommo-style nested filter.

apis.name: Get Task
apis.description: GET /tasks/{id}.

apis.name: Create Task
apis.description: POST /tasks — body MUST be an array.

apis.name: Update Task
apis.description: PATCH /tasks/{id}.

apis.name: Delete Task
apis.description: DELETE /tasks/{id}.

apis.name: List Events
apis.description: List CRM timeline events with paging and optional filter.

apis.name: List Notes
apis.description: GET /{entity_type}/{entity_id}/notes — list notes attached to a Kommo entity.

apis.name: Create Note
apis.description: POST /{entity_type}/{entity_id}/notes — body MUST be an array.

apis.name: List Custom Fields
apis.description: GET /{entity_type}/custom_fields.

apis.name: Create Custom Field
apis.description: POST /{entity_type}/custom_fields — body MUST be an array.

apis.name: List Pipelines
apis.description: GET /leads/pipelines — list configured pipelines + statuses.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET /users — list operator users attached to the Kommo account.

apis.name: Create Webhook
apis.description: POST /webhooks — register an outbound webhook destination + event settings.

apis.name: Delete Webhook
apis.description: DELETE /webhooks — remove an outbound webhook by destination URL.
